name: Clinton Country Club
address: 41 Fairway View Dr, Mill Hall, PA 17751
about: Clinton Country Club is an 18-hole public golf course in Central Pennsylvania, open to the public 7 days a week. The course, opened in 1976, offers a challenging test for golfers of all skill levels with beautiful landscaped fairways and scenic views. The venue features a 220-yard practice range with target mounds at 50, 100, 150, and 200 yards, and it also provides indoor golf simulators for play regardless of weather conditions. Memberships are available for those seeking added benefits and perks, with options including regular, couples, and young adult categories. The club hosts various tournaments and social events and maintains a pro shop for equipment and regripping services.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golf simulators available for year-round play
Variety of membership options with perks and benefits
Hosts tournaments and social events for community engagement

faq.answer: There is no information on BYOB policies or food and drink service on the premises.
